Title: Medical treatment
Descriptions: Field clinic (medic / first aid), not a surgeon: diseases, bleeding, vanilla fractures, full health/blood/shock, and Inedia deep wounds / fractures / pain where supported. No food, water, or stamina.
Does not remove embedded bullets or treat internal bleeding — those need proper surgery and tools in the field, not this paid package.
Talk to Peter and pay for the package: strong body recovery without filling hunger, thirst, or stamina.
ObjectiveText: Pay "Peter" for field medical treatment (not bullet surgery).
